railroad_name: HART Railroad, Pittsburgh & Chartiers Valley Division

routing_instructions.North Yard: Outbound coke staging — CK1 to South Yard scale when authorized.
routing_instructions.West Yard: D749 terminates here at end of session after return from Demmler.
routing_instructions.Scully Yard: POHC interchange — NVL picks up its block here at session start; STG-SCULLY runs end-of-session offline shuffle.
routing_instructions.Scully Offline: POHC offline party tracks — STG-SCULLY stages blocks after the operating session.
routing_instructions.Shenango Coke Works: Coke plant on Neville Island — CK1 picks coke blocks for weighing and resort at South Yard scale.
routing_instructions.Neville Island: Island industries — NVL delivers and pulls; cars remain spotted here between sessions.
routing_instructions.South Yard:
Classification hub and session start point.
D749 sets out inbound Demmler block here to begin ops.
NVL exchanges blocks with D749 (Demmler-bound off, Island-bound on).
routing_instructions.Demmler Yard: CSX interchange — D749 picks up inbound block at session start; STG-DEMMLER runs end-of-session offline shuffle.
routing_instructions.Demmler Offline: CSX offline party tracks — STG-DEMMLER stages blocks after the operating session.

session_start: Evaluate empty repositioning and generate new car orders if unfilled backlog is 30 or fewer.
D749 picks up all cars with orders at Demmler Yard and runs to South Yard.
D749 sets out the inbound block at South Yard — the operating session begins here.
Yardmaster and engineer swap blocks; D749 departs South Yard westbound.
NVL simultaneously assigns its block at Scully Yard and waits for D749 to cross the bridge with its load.
during_session: NVL comes to South Yard, sets out Demmler-bound blocks, picks up D749 blocks for Neville Island, and works the island industries and Shenango Coke Works.
CK1 picks up the coke block from Shenango Coke Works, runs to South Yard scale for weighing, and resorts cars for outgoing trains.
When NVL finishes island work, it returns to South Yard, sets out remaining Demmler-bound traffic, picks up Scully-bound cars, and returns to Scully Yard.
D749 returns from Demmler with a fresh block and terminates in West Yard for the night.
session_end: After D749 secures in West Yard, STG-SCULLY and STG-DEMMLER shuffle cars between interchange yards and offline party tracks.
Loads and unloads complete at offline facilities as cars are staged.

shipment_yard_balance._comment: Auto-balance Demmler vs Scully shipment intervals after cars are placed. Uses available home-yard fleet only (unavailable cars excluded).

jobs.name: D749
jobs.description:
CSX Neville Island Switcher.

SESSION START (inbound from Demmler):
1. Pick up all cars with orders at Demmler Yard.
2. Run to South Yard and set out the inbound block — the operating session begins here.
3. Yardmaster and engineer swap blocks; D749 departs South Yard westbound.

DURING SESSION:
- South Yard: pick up outbound for Demmler Yard and Demmler Offline; set out inbound.
- Demmler Yard: pick up inbound and offline traffic for Scully, Scully Offline, Shenango, Neville Island, and Demmler; set out outbound.

SESSION END:
- STG-DEMMLER stages Demmler Yard offline traffic (load/unload).
- Return from Demmler with a fresh block; cars remain on D749 for the night.
- NVL secures at Scully Yard; STG-SCULLY runs after.

jobs.name: NVL
jobs.description:
POHC Neville Local.

SESSION START:
- At Scully Yard, pick up the POHC block and hold for D749 to cross the bridge with its inbound load.

DURING SESSION:
1. After D749 clears the bridge, run to South Yard.
2. Set out blocks bound for Demmler; pick up D749 blocks for Neville Island.
3. Work Neville Island industries and Shenango Coke Works — leave cars spotted on the island.
4. Return to South Yard; set out remaining Demmler-bound traffic.
5. Pick up cars pending for Scully Yard and return to Scully.

Scully Yard: interchange pick up and set out.
South Yard: block exchange with D749.
Neville Island: industry spotting and pulls.

jobs.name: CK1
jobs.description:
Coke transfer train.

DURING SESSION (parallel with NVL):
1. Pick up loaded coke cars from Shenango Coke Works.
2. Run to South Yard track scale and weigh each car.
3. In-tolerance loads get outbound orders; off-tolerance loads get reload orders back to Shenango.
4. After weighing, pick up reload cars at South Yard and return them to Shenango Coke Works.
5. Set out outbound coke at South Yard for outgoing trains.

South Yard scale is the weigh point; reloads cycle Shenango ↔ scale ↔ Shenango.

jobs.name: STG-SCULLY
jobs.description:
Scully Yard staging — END OF SESSION ONLY (after D749 secures in West Yard).

Shuffle cars between Scully Yard and Scully Offline party tracks.
Step 10 picks at Scully Yard; step 11 set out at Scully Offline; steps 12–50 work offline blocks; step 60 returns cars to Scully Yard.
Loads and unloads complete at offline tracks as cars are staged.
